$comment: Reference schema for docnav config source examples that include Markdown native options. The schema describes JSON file shape only. Navigation input resolution owns source mapping and priority; selected adapter typed-field declarations own option semantics such as max_heading_level type and range validation before request construction.

enabled.description: Default pagination state for document operations.

limit.description: Default positive Markdown character budget for paginated document operations.

output.description: Default core CLI output mode for document operations.

options.description: Raw adapter-owned native option source map. The current Markdown descriptor declares max_heading_level for outline/find; navigation input resolution validates and extracts the typed 1..6 value from the selected adapter typed-field declaration.
